commands.review_summary:
The PR makes `localModelLean` derive structured Tool Search defaults when `tools.toolSearch` is unset, threads that effective config into embedded agent tool setup, and updates local-model docs and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +35, Tests +85, Docs +2. Total +122 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction. Source comparison shows current main lacks the proposed lean-mode Tool Search default and the PR adds that behavior with focused tests.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Protected maintainer PR plus compatibility-sensitive experimental default behavior needs maintainer acceptance; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.

target.title: fix(agents): compact lean local tool catalogs
target.body:
## Summary

- Defaults `localModelLean` runs to structured Tool Search controls when `tools.toolSearch` is not explicitly configured.
- Preserves explicit operator Tool Search config, including the `tools.toolSearch: false` opt-out.
- Threads the lean effective config into embedded runner Tool Search setup and documents the behavior for local model/Ollama users.

## Verification

Behavior addressed: local-model lean runs now compact larger tool catalogs behind structured Tool Search controls by default, reducing prompt/tool schema pressure for smaller models while preserving explicit operator config.

Real environment tested: focused local Vitest wrapper in a Codex worktree, docs/formatter/diff checks, branch autoreview, AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate on the immediately preceding rebase, and earlier Ollama Cloud source-level stream probes with hosted small models.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```sh
git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.ts
node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts --reporter=dot
node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md
node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md
.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main
node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --target linux --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 180m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"
```

Evidence after fix: refreshed head `73763414e09` is rebased onto `origin/main@b9fe0894a6d`; local focused wrapper passed `src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts` and `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts` with 65/65 tests after the final rebase; targeted oxlint, oxfmt, docs formatting, docs MDX, and diff checks passed after the final rebase; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings and `overall: patch is correct (0.82)`. AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` passed on the immediately preceding rebase with provider `aws`, lease `cbx_352b7add7d0f`, slug `silver-shrimp`, run `run_0e246f45ccf2`, machine `c7a.8xlarge`, exit 0; that gate selected lanes `core`, `coreTests`, and `docs`. After that gate, `main` advanced by `b9fe0894a6d`; the branch rebased cleanly and the focused local proof was rerun on the pushed head.

Earlier live Ollama Cloud source-level stream proof on this PR passed with structured Tool Search control tools for `gemma3:12b`, `rnj-1:8b`, and `gpt-oss:20b`; each payload contained `tool_search`, `tool_describe`, `tool_call`, `think: false`, `num_ctx: 4096`, and returned `OK`.

Observed result after fix: lean mode injects `{ enabled: true, mode: "tools", searchDefaultLimit: 5, maxSearchLimit: 10 }` only when Tool Search is unset; explicit `tools.toolSearch` config remains untouched; the embedded runner uses the derived runtime config consistently for control exposure and catalog compaction.

What was not tested: no full end-to-end chat/channel agent turn with a live local Ollama daemon in this PR; no remote `check:changed` after the last no-conflict rebase onto `b9fe0894a6d` because `main` moved immediately after the previous green remote gate. PR CI is running on `73763414e09`.
target.author: vincentkoc
